business.title: RTX's Collins Aerospace and Air Canada unveil Aurora suites and economy seats across the carrier's A321XLR fleet
business.description: Custom Aurora suites provide luxury, premium passenger comfort and intelligent cabin integrationHAMBURG, Germany, April 14, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Collins Aerospace, an RTX (NYSE: RTX) business, and Air Canada today announced that the carrier's new fleet of Airbus A321XLR aircraft will be furnished entirely with Collins' seating solutions. Fourteen premium Aurora business class suites will be installed at the front of the aircraft while 168 Meridian+ main cabin seats will fill out the economy cabin.The custom lie-flat Aurora suites, revealed at the Aircraft Interiors Expo in Hamburg, Germany, showcase an industrial design, trim, and finish customized by Air Canada alongside Collins and Air Canada's design partner, Acumen. The suite offers a balance of privacy and sociability with a noticeably warmer palette, where elegant lighting gently accentuates custom materials, rich wood, stone, and bronze accents.

science.title: Mini lake meets snowy rim of Canada's oldest ice mass - Earth from space
science.description: A 2010 satellite photo shows the point where a small lake bisects the snowy rim of an ancient glacier on Canada's Baffin Island. The rippling, snow-rimmed structure is the last remaining fragment of a colossal ice sheet that once covered large parts of North America.

ai.title: Viral video of camera-wearing factory workers spark fears of AI learning from human labour
ai.description: Viral clip showing factory workers wearing head-mounted cameras have ignited debate over whether AI is being trained on human labour in real time. While unverified, the possibility raises urgent questions about job security, worker consent and whether automation is quietly expanding beyond white-collar roles into physical industries.

ai.title: Google unveils free NEET UG practice tests on Gemini to support medical aspirants
ai.description: Google has expanded its AI-powered educational offerings by introducing full-length practice tests for India’s NEET UG exam through its AI platform, Gemini. These tests are developed using rigorously vetted content from established Indian education companies and offer a no-cost, exam-like practice experience. This is part of Google’s commitment to democratise access to quality test resources.
